reviews.review_heading: My college was very important for every student, who wants to grow in their careers.
reviews.review_text: In my course, there were pharmaceutical labs for performing practical medicine. Library was also available for students and faculty members. There were hostel facilities for students and food is also very good for students health. There was mess and canteen. Medical facilities and sports grounds were also available.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good for taking admission.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is well-developed with ongoing construction. Labs are not well-developed, but classrooms are good, and the library is suitable for studying. Everything is good, not bad at all. A student must develop personally after studying in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good infrastructure and placement record.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is the only thing that can attract students and new joiners. But it should not be the center of attraction for admissions. The campus is fully equipped with facilities like a central digital library, laboratory with Wi-Fi facility, digital classrooms, hostel, mess facility, sports, etc.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because of its placements record.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good students have well-managed laboratories and smart classrooms and also a well-stocked library. The infrastructure is also good as it includes every facility that is needed in our department. The Wi-Fi facility is also available. Students have a big canteen that provides quality food. It has a playground and courts for many sports like football, cricket, basketball, badminton, baseball, and many more. The medical facility is also available for students and staff.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Technocrats Institute of Technology - Pharmacy Education and Research.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi, but the location here is very good. The food is also good, and the library is big and decent. There is also biometric attendance. Labs here are huge and very good. In this college, you get to see students from all the states.

reviews.review_heading: It has the best faculty, good infrastructure, proper facilities, and great placements in 2022.
reviews.review_text: Students can use facilities like Wi-Fi in the whole building for students to access or surf the internet to make their work easier, like getting any information related to their course. Well-developed labs having all the lab equipment for students with instructors are provided to do the experiments related to their course. In the hostel, every facility is provided for students, like a canteen for good and healthy food, a dispensary, and a playing yard behind the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure, helpful professors, and reasonable placement.
reviews.review_text: Well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, Wi-Fi, and a central library with pharmaceutical materials are available in the B. Pharma department. The hostel amenities, which include internet, water, and clean rooms, are adequate. Medical assistance is accessible, the mess food is hygienic, and a variety of indoor and outdoor games are supported by the sports grounds.

review_content.Placements: The final year students are offered jobs from various companies with a minimum package of 2 to 3 Lacs per annum. One of our seniors got a placement in Nescafe company with a salary of 12 Lacs per annum, holding a position of department head with 16 employees working under her.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides 4 different blocks of hostels depending on accommodation and other facilities. There are many indoor as well as outdoor activities for students such as swimming, gym, chess, badminton, and other activities as well. All the students, whether day scholars or hostellers, can take advantage of this.

reviews_list.review_title: Best college in Jalandhar for girls as it is not a Co-Ed college.

review_content.Placements: Many companies come to our college and select students and give them the best placements with the best salary packages but I never ever applied for any placements. Mostly, 40–50% of the students apply for the placements and get selected. The students will be selected on a merit basis and based on their performance.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the infrastructure of our college is not up to par, but if you look at the fee structure of a college, then at that price, the college's first structure is not bad. All the quality of the food is very good, the canteen is very neat and clean and there are many sports and game facilities. All though our classes are not air conditioned, all the labs and libraries are fully air conditioned.

overview_faqs.question: Can Hans Raj Mahila Maha Vidyalaya be considered as a reputed Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at Hans Raj Mahila Maha Vidyalaya are B.P.Ed, B.Sc., B.A., B.Com, BBA, BCA, UG Diploma, B.Des, BFA, B.Voc, M.A., PG Diploma, M.Sc., M.Com, PGDCA. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, Hans Raj Mahila Maha Vidyalaya has a rating of 3.9 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 3.7, 3.4, 4.3 and 4.1 as per reviews by students.

review_summary.college_name: Hans Raj Mahila Maha Vidyalaya Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Voc. in Cosmetology and Wellness - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: M.Voc. cosmetology course admission, 2026.

content.Placements: Approximately 70% of students found employment. The lowest package is about 2.5 LPA, the highest is about 6 LPA, and the average is about 4 LPA. Cosmetic brands, wellness chains, and beauty salons are among the recruiters. Salon and skincare companies offered internships. However, there aren't many worldwide opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, a library with cosmetology resources, and contemporary skincare and haircare equipment are all features of the labs. The hostel is fine, but there isn't much variety in the food. There are sports and medical facilities, but the upkeep of the hostel needs to be improved.

individual_reviews.title: My honest review of my college.

content.Placements: Placements of the college are average. All the placements of individual courses are conducted like commerce, fashion designing, computer science, etc. The faculty who arrange the placement drive are supportive and commendably amazing encourage us to take part in drives and encourage us to get selected.
content.Infrastructure: The course is no doubt world-class and competitive to any international school. The hostel of my college is good. The hostel is clean. All the rooms are well-furnished. Hostels are the USP of my college. Freshers and farewells are organized in the hostel for the enjoyment of the boarders as well. The school even has internationally renowned visiting faculty who train us on the most recent research topics. Courses like environment, development economics, game theory, and industrial economics are some of the value-added subjects along with the specialization in econometrics give a competitive advantage to students.

individual_reviews.title: College - A place where we gain practical knowledge.

content.Placements: The final year students are offered jobs from various companies with a minimum package of 2 to 3 Lacs per annum. One of our seniors got a placement in Nescafe company with a salary of 12 Lacs per annum, holding a position of department head with 16 employees working under her.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides 4 different blocks of hostels depending on accommodation and other facilities. There are many indoor as well as outdoor activities for students such as swimming, gym, chess, badminton, and other activities as well. All the students, whether day scholars or hostellers, can take advantage of this.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Best college in Jalandhar for girls as it is not a Co-Ed college.

content.Placements: Many companies come to our college and select students and give them the best placements with the best salary packages but I never ever applied for any placements. Mostly, 40–50% of the students apply for the placements and get selected. The students will be selected on a merit basis and based on their performance.
content.Infrastructure: All the infrastructure of our college is not up to par, but if you look at the fee structure of a college, then at that price, the college's first structure is not bad. All the quality of the food is very good, the canteen is very neat and clean and there are many sports and game facilities. All though our classes are not air conditioned, all the labs and libraries are fully air conditioned.

individual_reviews.course: B.Voc. in Fashion Technology - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college is very good.

content.Placements: Students got internships from our college in the apparel industry. Top roles are not offered to students.
content.Infrastructure: Our classrooms are not Wi-Fi enabled. Our college has many labs. Our library is air-conditioned. Our classrooms are very hot during summer, and the fans do not work well. The food served in the canteen is very costly. Our canteen crowd is more.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are helpful and knowledgeable.
